'''kaloso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yodaish|yodaish]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yodaish|yodaish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kaloso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæleseth|kæleseth]] || [[word:kælesej|kælesej]] || [[word:kælesesh|kælesesh]] || [[word:kælese|kælese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kalolosoth|kalolosoth]] || [[word:kalolosoj|kalolosoj]] || [[word:kalolososh|kalolososh]] || [[word:kaloloso|kaloloso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kalosoth|kalosoth]] || [[word:kalosoj|kalosoj]] || [[word:kalososh|kalososh]] || [[word:kaloso|kaloso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kalofsoth|kalofsoth]] || [[word:kalofsoj|kalofsoj]] || [[word:kalofsosh|kalofsosh]] || [[word:kalofsof|kalofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kalosotho|kalosotho]] || [[word:kalosojo|kalosojo]] || [[word:kalososho|kalososho]] || [[word:kalosoko|kalosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kalosoth|kalosoth]] || [[word:kalosoj|kalosoj]] || [[word:kalososh|kalososh]] || [[word:kaloso|kaloso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kalosothol|kalosothol]] || [[word:kalosojol|kalosojol]] || [[word:kalososhol|kalososhol]] || [[word:kalosokol|kalosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kalosothotho|kalosothotho]] || [[word:kalosojojo|kalosojojo]] || [[word:kalososhosho|kalososhosho]] || [[word:kalosoko|kalosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kalosothon|kalosothon]] || [[word:kalosojon|kalosojon]] || [[word:kalososhon|kalososhon]] || [[word:kalosokon|kalosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kalosothoro|kalosothoro]] || [[word:kalosojoro|kalosojoro]] || [[word:kalososhoro|kalososhoro]] || [[word:kalosokoro|kalosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
